name: Rhubarb Strawberry Crisp
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Fresh rhubarb, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the rhubarb, strawberries and sugar in a mixing bowl.
2. Transfer the mixture to a 9-inch square baking dish.
3. In another bowl, combine the flour, oats, brown sugar and butter until crumbly.
4. Sprinkle the crumb mixture evenly over the rhubarb and strawberries.
5. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for about 40 minutes or until the rhubarb is tender.
If fresh strawberries are used, increase the sugar to 1/2 cup.
